FacebookReport.title: FacebookReport
FacebookReport.description: A user-reported harmful or inappropriate Facebook post

facebookLink.description: The URL link to the reported Facebook post

category.description: The custom category of the violation manually entered by the user

description.description: Additional notes, details, or description about why the post is inappropriate

timestamp.description: The millisecond timestamp when the report was submitted

clickCount.description: The number of users who clicked the reported post link

BotLog.title: BotLog
BotLog.description: A search engine crawler or spider robot visitation activity log

name.description: The classified crawler name (e.g., GOOGLEBOT, BINGBOT)

userAgent.description: Full crawler browser User-Agent identifier string

category.description: The campaign category page current when scanned

AnalyticsConfig.title: AnalyticsConfig
AnalyticsConfig.description: Google Analytics and Tag Manager campaign credentials config

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of bad Facebook posts reported by users

/bot_logs/{logId}.description: Collection of search spiders logging events

/online_users/{visitorId}.description: Real-time active user sessions tracker mapping
